failedAssertions.reason: Contract requires 15 hooks; scan found 14 hook files under apps/trading/src/cash/hooks, so assertion criteria are not fully met.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Could not validate post-connect truncated Aptos address state headlessly due external wallet/account authentication limitations. Pre-connect UX states were verified.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented fallback for API verification when agent-browser network capture is empty: use in-page fetch() checks with recorded HTTP status codes.
